mapper.sql: id, name, description, device_id, metric, operator, threshold, duration_seconds, level, enabled, created_at, updated_at, season, is_system_template, condition_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM alert_rules
AND enabled = #{enabled}
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT
FROM alert_rules WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM alert_rules WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} OR device_id IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT
FROM alert_rules WHERE enabled = TRUE ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_rules (name, description, device_id, metric, operator, threshold, duration_seconds, level, enabled, created_at, updated_at, season, is_system_template, condition_type) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{deviceId}, #{metric}, #{operator}, #{threshold}, #{durationSeconds}, #{level}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{season}, #{isSystemTemplate}, #{conditionType})
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_rules SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, device_id = #{deviceId}, metric = #{metric}, operator = #{operator}, threshold = #{threshold}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, level = #{level}, enabled = #{enabled}, season = #{season}, is_system_template = #{isSystemTemplate}, condition_type = #{conditionType}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM alert_rules
AND enabled = #{enabled}
AND (season = #{season} OR season IS NULL)
ORDER BY is_system_template DESC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM alert_rules
AND is_system_template = TRUE
AND season = #{season}
ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM alert_rules
AND (is_system_template = FALSE OR is_system_template IS NULL)
AND (device_id = #{deviceId} OR device_id IS NULL)
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM alert_rules WHERE id = #{id} AND (is_system_template = FALSE OR is_system_template IS NULL)
